summary: drbi.org is LIVE on Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 + Astro 7. Cutover complete (custom domains drbi.org + www attached, reassigned from blogworks). Passwordless whitelist auth, secrets in CF store, CF Web Analytics, full admin working. Pre-deploy gate 79/79 passing against production drbi.org.
user_actions: add drbi.org + www.drbi.org to Google OAuth Authorized JS origins (One Tap)
create CF Web Analytics site -> set PUBLIC_CF_BEACON_TOKEN
rollback: detach drbi.org custom domain / re-point to blogworks
